name: systems-thinking-toolkit
description: Systems thinking toolkit grounded in Dennis Sherwood, Seeing the Forest for the Trees (2002). 7 functional skills + 1 router. Carry-1 cld-craft (prose → fully-annotated Mermaid CLD; 12 hygiene rules + Rule 7 fuzzy elevation + R/B classification + Sterman uniflow discipline) feeds downstream: cld-archetypes (limits-to-growth + variance/target/action; v0.7 adds magnitude-comparison rule for Both-at-once + Branch L disambiguation for vicious-R-as-brake vs standalone runaway), cld-overlay (outward stakeholder straddle), team-mental-model (inward convergence + leadership energy proxies), strategy-lever-and-cascade (v0.6 Martian-test perturbation inline; v0.7 STOP-after-Step-4 rule + HOLD-lever named pattern), simulation-modeling (CLD → stock-flow, text-only). Plus V1-weak manager-personality-quadrant kept with strengthened facilitation-vocabulary-only Boundary. v0.7 also adds CI check for plugin-description ↔ skill-folder drift + plugin READMEs synced to v0.6 7-skill state. Distilled via tsundoku:book-distill RIA-TV++ pipeline. システム思考ツールキット — Sherwood 2002 ベース。系統思考工具組 — Sherwood 2002 為本。
